title: Other powers of board, effect on
doc_html:
§43.  Other powers of board, effect on

Nothing contained in R.S. 34:41 and 34:42 shall be construed as limiting or modifying the powers of the Board of Commissioners of the Port of New Orleans, granted by the constitution and other laws.
doc_text:
§43.  Other powers of board, effect on
Nothing contained in R.S. 34:41 and 34:42 shall be construed as limiting or modifying the powers of the Board of Commissioners of the Port of New Orleans, granted by the constitution and other laws.
